hierarchy.rationale: Each archetype exposes purpose, dominant signal and primary decision within the first fold without equal-weight controls.

proportions.rationale: Workbench ownership, editorial report width and focused settings measure remain balanced across desktop and compact layouts.

rhythm.rationale: Tokenized spacing creates deliberate pauses between context, signals, evidence and commands while maintaining scan continuity.
rhythm.evidence: desktop and mobile full-page durable baselines

density.rationale: The surface system keeps operational density high without truncating the key datum and adapts cards through the shared density contract.

depth.rationale: Base, open rail, selected row, immersive stage and floating command use distinct semantic elevation roles instead of uniform shadows.

surfaceEconomy.rationale: Signals are integrated, inventory and evidence sections are open, and only selected, immersive, stage or floating roles receive chrome.
surfaceEconomy.evidence: desktop workbench/report/settings first-fold baselines + data-ui-surface enterprise probe

visualImpact.rationale: The workbench hero and production stage, editorial report narrative, and asymmetric settings impact panel create task-native focal moments.
visualImpact.evidence: three desktop first-fold baselines + three mobile first-fold baselines

typography.rationale: Editorial headings, operational labels, metrics and supporting copy form distinct roles with stable measure and strong legibility.

color.rationale: Navy and azure establish product identity while semantic green, amber and blue remain tied to status and evidence roles.
color.evidence: all first-fold baselines + zero axe contrast findings

iconography.rationale: Icons consistently reinforce status, signal type and action with aligned tiles, labels and color-independent semantics.
iconography.evidence: signal rails and selection rows across durable baselines

responsive.rationale: At 390px every recipe recomposes into a coherent narrative, preserves touch targets and reports exact zero page overflow.

motion.rationale: Causal selection, recalculation and chart motion use canonical tokens, keyboard parity, reduced-motion equivalence and AA intermediate frames.
motion.evidence: selection/recalculation feedback, settled, keyboard and reduced-motion baselines

fidelity.rationale: The repo-native direction survives token and primitive mapping across three distinct archetypes without literal framework defaults.
fidelity.evidence: visual direction contract + all first-fold baselines

genericTemplateResistance.rationale: Workbench ownership, editorial reporting and impact-led settings each have a recognizable composition beyond generic KPI-card dashboards.
genericTemplateResistance.evidence: three archetype first-fold baselines + enterprise rubric pass
